data.name: DashboardSubtitle
data.value: Manage and monitor the entire system

data.name: Teacher Nguyen creates new exam questions
data.value: Teacher Nguyen creates new exam questions

data.name: Warning: Server is under high load.
data.value: Warning: Server is under high load

data.name: UserListDescription
data.value: List of users in the system

data.name: ActivityStats7Days
data.value: Activity statistics over the last 7 days

data.name: DatabaseWarning
data.value: Warning: Changing the database configuration can affect the operation of the system. Please ensure you have backed up the data before making changes.

data.name: ErrLockedAccount
data.value: Account locked due to too many failed attempts. Please try again in {0} minutes.

data.name: ErrWrongPasswordLimit
data.value: You have entered incorrectly {0} times. Account locked for 15 minutes!

data.name: ErrWrongPassword
data.value: Incorrect password. You have {0} attempts left.

data.name: ErrWaitAdminApprove
data.value: Your account is waiting for Admin approval. Please check back later!

data.name: ErrWrongRole
data.value: Your account does not belong to this role. Please select the correct role.

data.name: ErrMinPasswordLen
data.value: The system requires a minimum password length of {0} characters.

data.name: MsgRegisterSuccessWaitApprove
data.value: Registration successful! Please wait for Admin approval to login.

data.name: MsgConfirmBackup
data.value: ⚠️ SYSTEM WARNING:\nAre you sure you want to backup and download all data to your computer?

data.name: MsgConfirmApprove
data.value: Are you sure you want to approve and grant access to this account?

data.name: MsgConfirmDelete
data.value: ALERT: Are you sure you want to PERMANENTLY DELETE this account? This action cannot be undone!

data.name: MsgNameEmailRequired
data.value: ⚠️ Name and Email cannot be empty!

data.name: MsgPromptEmail
data.value: Enter the email address you want to test:

data.name: MsgRequireSmtp
data.value: ⚠️ SMTP User and Password are required!

data.name: MsgPdfExportError
data.value: An error occurred while exporting PDF!

data.name: LpHeroTitle
data.value: Online Examination and Competency Assessment System

data.name: LpHeroDesc
data.value: A comprehensive solution for creating exams, organizing online testing, and assessing student competency professionally and effectively.

data.name: LpFeaturesDesc
data.value: The system is designed to meet all needs in the process of organizing and managing exams.

data.name: LpFeat1Desc
data.value: Intuitive exam creation tool with a rich and diverse question bank.

data.name: LpFeat2Desc
data.value: Organize secure online exams with automated monitoring and anti-cheat features.

data.name: LpFeat3Desc
data.value: Analyze exam results with visual charts and comprehensive statistics.

data.name: LpFeat4Desc
data.value: Multi-layer security system ensures the safety of information and exam results.

data.name: LpFeat5Desc
data.value: Fast and accurate grading with smart algorithms.

data.name: LpFeat6Desc
data.value: Manage candidates, teachers, and flexible role-based access control.

data.name: LpAboutDesc
data.value: EduTest Pro is a leading online exam and assessment platform, designed specifically for schools and educational institutions. We are committed to providing modern technology solutions that enhance the quality of teaching and learning.

data.name: LpFooterDesc
data.value: The leading online testing and competency assessment solution for modern education.

data.name: ValUsernameTooLong
data.value: Username is too long, please shorten it!

data.name: ValUsernameMinLength
data.value: Username must be at least 3 characters

data.name: ValPasswordMinLength
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters

data.name: ConfirmLogout
data.value: Are you sure you want to log out?

data.name: JoinedClassesDesc
data.value: List of classes you are currently enrolled in

data.name: NoJoinedClasses
data.value: You haven't joined any classes yet.

data.name: SearchExamPlaceholder
data.value: Search exams by name or subject...

data.name: TooltipAvailable
data.value: You can start this exam now

data.name: TooltipNotYet
data.value: It is not time to take this exam yet

data.name: NoExamsAvailableDesc
data.value: You don't have any exams from your joined classes yet.

data.name: NoMatchingExamsDesc
data.value: Try changing filter conditions or search keywords.

data.name: DragDropExcel
data.value: Drag and drop Excel file here

data.name: PendingExamMsg
data.value: You have a pending exam creation:

data.name: InstDashboardSub
data.value: Manage classes, exams, and evaluate results

data.name: MyClassesSub
data.value: Manage the classes you have created

data.name: ManageExamsSub
data.value: List of exams you have created

data.name: ConfirmSubmitDesc
data.value: Are you sure you want to submit your exam?

data.name: SubmitSuccessDesc
data.value: The system has recorded your results.

data.name: WarningUnanswered
data.value: You have {0} unanswered questions. The exam cannot be edited after submission.

data.name: SwalSaveSuccessText
data.value: You can retake this exam anytime from your study list.

data.name: SwalDeleteWarningText
data.value: You are deleting a SELF-CREATED exam. This will clear the attempt AND DELETE ALL QUESTIONS. Cannot be undone!

data.name: SwalDeleteSuccessText
data.value: All personal exam data has been deleted.

data.name: CreateClassSub
data.value: Create a class to manage students

data.name: RequireFieldsError
data.value: Please fill in all required fields

data.name: ClassSuccessSub
data.value: Your class has been initialized and is ready to use.

data.name: ConfirmDeleteClass
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this?

data.name: CreateExamSub
data.value: Setup information and questions for the exam

data.name: ActivateExamDesc
data.value: Students can start taking the exam

data.name: RequireAtLeastOneQuestion
data.value: Please add at least one question

data.name: RequireQuestionContent
data.value: Question {0}: Please enter the question content

data.name: DetailSelectExam
data.value: Select an exam to view details

data.name: StatsDetailMsg
data.value: Detailed statistics will be displayed here

data.name: JsConfirmActivate
data.value: Activate exam? Students will be able to start.

data.name: JsConfirmPause
data.value: Pause exam? Students currently taking it will be interrupted.

data.name: JsConfirmEnd
data.value: End exam? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: JsConfirmDelete
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this exam?

data.name: NoResultsMsg
data.value: No students have completed this exam yet.

data.name: CheckCorrectAnswerHint
data.value: Check the box on the right to mark the correct answer
